scripts.dev: node "./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js" -k -c auto -n api "npm run dev --workspace apps/api --if-present"
scripts.typecheck:js: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/chain && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared
scripts.test:js: npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/chain
